title: Near-death experiences in cardiac arrest survivors.

assets.abstract: Near-death experiences (NDEs) have become the focus of much interest in the last 30 years or so. Such experiences can occur both when individuals are objectively near to death and also when they simply believe themselves to be. The experience typically involves a number of different components including a feeling of peace and well-being, out-of-body experiences (OBEs), entering a region of darkness, seeing a brilliant light, and entering another realm. phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.
